parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Pushed destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise pushed:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channel skips Apprise and POSTs a native Pushed JSON payload (app_key, app_secret, content) directly to api.pushed.co.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"app_key":"${ customer_secrets.PUSHED_APP_KEY }","app_secret":"${ customer_secrets.PUSHED_APP_SECRET }","target_type":"app","content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Pushed API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Pushed destinations, direct

app_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Pushed app key

app_secret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Pushed app secret
